task: Review the PM-due list, confirm interval triggers, and open or approve work orders for units at or past service interval before they cycle back out.
tool_today: RentalMan maintenance module, meter or telematics feeds, spreadsheet fallback
decision_content: Whether a unit can safely defer service to protect a live contract or must be pulled now to protect uptime and safety.

task: Triage and resequence the open work-order queue and reassign technicians when urgent contract needs or repair exceptions change priorities.
frequency: multiple times per day in busy periods
tool_today: RentalMan work-order board, shop whiteboard, technician mobile updates
decision_content: Which repair truly threatens a live contract, whether to authorize overtime, and when to outsource or defer work.

task: Publish daily not-available status updates and realistic return-to-fleet dates for every unit in the shop so branch and counter teams can book accurately.
tool_today: RentalMan equipment status screens, email, text, phone
decision_content: Whether the repair estimate is reliable enough to communicate outward and when a slipping ETA requires escalation to branch leadership.

task: Evaluate chronic or high-cost repairs and recommend whether a unit should be repaired, repositioned, sold, or retired.
tool_today: Maintenance cost reports, asset lifecycle data, vendor quotes, spreadsheet
decision_content: Whether the repair-to-value and utilization picture supports more spend, a transfer, or a disposal recommendation.

task: Oversee and document pre-delivery and post-rental inspections so defects, failed items, and compliance records are captured in an audit-ready workflow.
frequency: every rental cycle through the shop
tool_today: Digital or paper inspection checklists, RentalMan status screens, compliance calendar
decision_content: Whether a unit passes, needs conditional follow-up, or must fail and open a new work order before it can return to rent.

task: Monitor parts and consumables levels against open work and approve routine replenishment or escalation when blocked jobs threaten throughput.
tool_today: Parts inventory module, purchase-order system, vendor contacts
decision_content: What stocking level is justified, whether an emergency order premium is worth it, and when unusual demand should trigger sourcing escalation.

task: Assemble weekly shop KPIs including work-order cycle time, downtime days, PM compliance, and cost-per-repair for branch review.
tool_today: RentalMan maintenance reports, spreadsheets, slide or email summary
decision_content: Which trends need explanation and which corrective actions are mature enough to recommend to branch leadership.
